news.title:
Hero MotoCorp-backed Euler Motors raises ₹437.5 crore in Series E funding led by Lightrock.
Total ₹687.5 crore raised includes ₹250 crore debt funding from BlackSoil, Trifecta, InnoVen, Alteria Capital.
news.summary:
Hero MotoCorp-backed Euler Motors raises ₹437.5 crore in Series E funding led by Lightrock.
Total ₹687.5 crore raised includes ₹250 crore debt funding from BlackSoil, Trifecta, InnoVen, Alteria Capital.

news.title:
CLSA cuts target prices for major auto stocks like Tata Motors, M&M, Hero MotoCorp, citing crude price risks.
Preferred picks include M&M, Bajaj Auto, TVS, Ashok Leyland due to stronger execution amid earnings risks.
news.summary:
CLSA cuts target prices for major auto stocks like Tata Motors, M&M, Hero MotoCorp, citing crude price risks.
Preferred picks include M&M, Bajaj Auto, TVS, Ashok Leyland due to stronger execution amid earnings risks.

news.title:
Hero MotoCorp discloses under SEBI regulation that interim dividend for FY 2025-26 is withheld for shareholders with incomplete KYC.
SEBI mandates electronic dividend payment; shareholders urged to update KYC/bank details to receive withheld dividends.
news.summary:
Hero MotoCorp discloses under SEBI regulation that interim dividend for FY 2025-26 is withheld for shareholders with incomplete KYC.
SEBI mandates electronic dividend payment; shareholders urged to update KYC/bank details to receive withheld dividends.

news.title:
Hero MotoCorp's tax demand reduced from ₹177.96 Cr to ₹27 Cr.
Company plans to appeal for remaining tax and potential refunds.
news.summary:
Hero MotoCorp's tax demand reduced from ₹177.96 Cr to ₹27 Cr.
Company plans to appeal for remaining tax and potential refunds.

news.title:
Two-wheeler sales up 35% in Feb 2026, aided by GST cut and better demand.
Hero MotoCorp leads with 45% growth; Suzuki Motorcycle volumes rise 38%, Royal Enfield expands capacity.
news.summary:
Two-wheeler sales up 35% in Feb 2026, aided by GST cut and better demand.
Hero MotoCorp leads with 45% growth; Suzuki Motorcycle volumes rise 38%, Royal Enfield expands capacity.

news.title:
Hero MotoCorp's Feb sales rose 43.8% YoY to 5.58 lakh units.
Domestic sales grew 44.7% to 5.16 lakh units; exports rose 34% YoY.
news.summary:
Hero MotoCorp's Feb sales rose 43.8% YoY to 5.58 lakh units.
Domestic sales grew 44.7% to 5.16 lakh units; exports rose 34% YoY.

news.title:
Hero Moto rises 4% as auto stocks gain on strong February registration data.
Vedanta jumps 5% after BOFA upgrades to 'buy' and raises target price by 75%.
news.summary:
Hero Moto rises 4% as auto stocks gain on strong February registration data.
Vedanta jumps 5% after BOFA upgrades to 'buy' and raises target price by 75%.

news.title:
Hero Fincorp aims profitability by focusing on secured lending, reduced credit costs, and better collection efficiency.
EV expansion planned by FY'27; new products and brand strategy targeting growth, market share gains except premium segment in Q3.
news.summary:
Hero Fincorp aims profitability by focusing on secured lending, reduced credit costs, and better collection efficiency.
EV expansion planned by FY'27; new products and brand strategy targeting growth, market share gains except premium segment in Q3.

news.title:
Hero MotoCorp plans to boost growth in scooters, premium bikes, EVs, and global markets.
It may cautiously raise prices due to commodity inflation but expects stable demand.
news.summary:

news.title:
Hero MotoCorp released the audio recording for Q3 & 9M FY25 earnings call on its website.
The update complies with SEBI's LODR Regulation 30; dissemination requested.
news.summary:

news.title:
Hero MotoCorp Ltd. reported flat financial performance for Dec 2025 quarter, diverging from its growth trend.
Despite this, Hero MotoCorp maintains strong historical growth and operational efficiency in the automobile sector.
news.summary:

news.title:
Hero MotoCorp anticipates double-digit growth in Q4 two-wheeler sales, driven by strong demand.
The company attributes growth projections to effective strategies and market conditions.

news.title:
Stocks in focus: Tata Steel, Hero MotoCorp, Bharti Airtel, RIL, Nykaa.
Analysts suggest buying on dips if Nifty holds above 25,400 with upside to 26,000.

Demand surge contributes to Hero MotoCorp's record-breaking performance.

news.title:
Hero MotoCorp approves Rs. 275 crore investment in Euler Motors.
This raises Hero MotoCorp's stake in Euler Motors to about 36%.

news.title:
Hero MotoCorp's Q3 FY23 net profit rose to ₹13.5B from ₹12.03B YoY, missing ₹13.9B estimate.
Q3 revenue improved to ₹123.3B, up from ₹102.11B YoY, showing strong growth.
news.summary:
Hero MotoCorp's Q3 FY23 net profit rose to ₹13.5B from ₹12.03B YoY, missing ₹13.9B estimate.
Q3 revenue improved to ₹123.3B, up from ₹102.11B YoY, showing strong growth.

news.title:
Hero MotoCorp to announce Q3FY26 results on Feb 5; earnings call scheduled for Feb 6.
Stock gained 5.1% in 5 days, but fell 2.2% in a month; 1Y rise at 38.2%.
news.summary:
